events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault: missing guides near expansion loops in-service. Hangers & supports. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Missing guides near expansion loops can cause pipe to move improperly, stress, anchor loads, potential failure. In-service, degraded/failed? Component conditions maybe degraded or failed? The categories that may apply: degraded, failed. Missing guides is installation defect/non-compliant. Required component_conditions list includes possible values: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. We should include non-compliant, installed-defective maybe. Since missing guides near expansion loops violates support standards/MSS SP-58. In-service, could be degraded due to thermal cycling without guides. But the prompt says categories that may apply: degraded, failed. However schema allows multiple. We can include non-compliant, installed-defective, degraded. Need risk high? Missing guides near expansion loops: high because thermal expansion can cause uncontrolled movement, stress, fatigue, possible catastrophic pipe failure. Decision fail. Work_stage in-service. percent_complete 100? Work is in-service as operating asset, so complete. value 0. confidence high 0.9. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: missing pipe guides adjacent to expansion loops; unsupported/unguided thermal movement; non-compliance with support standards/MSS SP-58. actions: install proper guides per project support standards/MSS SP-58 near expansion loops; inspect adjacent supports/anchors; assess pipe stress/movement; submit corrective support details for review. rationale: expansion loops require guides to direct thermal expansion movement into the loop and prevent lateral displacement; absence can cause overstress, anchor loading, fatigue, leaks. references: project support standards, MSS SP-58. Need ensure JSON valid.

  "findings": [
    "Pipe guides are missing near expansion loops.",
    "Thermal expansion movement is not properly directed or constrained.",
    "Support configuration does not comply with project support standards or MSS SP-58.",
    "Risk of overstress, anchor overload, fatigue, and eventual leakage or rupture in service."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install required pipe guides adjacent to expansion loops per project support standards and MSS SP-58.",
    "Inspect nearby anchors, supports, and expansion loop geometry for displacement or damage.",
    "Perform a pipe-stress/thermal-movement review to confirm guide spacing and orientation.",
    "Submit corrective support details for engineer/inspector approval before returning to service."
  ],
  "rationale": "Expansion loops rely on guides to channel thermal growth into the loop and prevent unwanted lateral or rotational movement. Missing guides allows the piping to wander, increasing stress on anchors, joints, and supports and creating a fatigue/leak risk in an operating system.",
  "references": [
    "project support standards",
    "MSS SP-58"
  ]
}
